features: A SINGLE SOLUTION: CARE + PROTECT Triple Power Pods effectively combines descaling, degreasing and sanitizing products for washing machines and dishwashers in a single product
ENERGY SAVING: Triple Power Pods can be used with a normal full washing cycle; safe in contact with your clothes and plates. Saving your time and energy in doing the maintenance for you appliances

LONG-LASTING PROTECTION: Protect your washing machine/dishwasher against formation of limescale, dirt residues and bad smells. Only need to be used once a month to achieve the optimal result! Pack of 6 pods for 6 months of protection

POWERFUL MAINTENANCE: Removes limescale deposits, thoroughly cleans and eliminates mould and unpleasant odours from pipes, filters and the inside of the machine; extends the life of the appliance and optimising performance with an additional benefit in reducing energy consumption
UNIQUE LIQUID FORMULA: Guaranteed result with no residues left. The Power Pod will activate itself to clean and descale simultaneously at any washing programs selected, even at a low temperature
description: Product Description Thanks to CARE + PROTECT Triple Power Pods, now you can easily maintain the performance and extend the life of your washing machines and dishwashers without waiting!Just add one pod into your machine during a normal washing cycle at any washing programs! The pod will activate itself to clean and descale simultaneously even at a low temperature. No extra cycle or action needed!The powerful liquid formula guarantees a quick action and result with no residues, absolutely safe with your clothes and plates! Ingredients descaler
